title: phyllanthus pinifolius
intro: Phyllanthus pinifolius, also known as Neem tree, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant's leaves, bark, and seeds have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating liver and kidney disorders, due to their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus pinifolius include reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of asthma and bronchitis, and providing protection against certain types of cancer. Phyllanthus pinifolius can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or oil, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
